description: CompositionBlack and white check skirt with a broad elasticated waist in black, made of 100% cotton, has square pleats and ribbon bow in red on the frontFittingComfortWash careWash separately with mild detergent Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Dry clean preferred Designed for your pretty little princess, this skirt from ant oozes girly attitude. The pleats lend it a cute vibe, while the fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with a lace top or T-shirt and sandals and watch your little girl enjoy in absolute comfort.
